title: A procedure to compare milk persistency between treatments with linear regression
author: ANGER, Jean-Charles
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This procedure aims to compare milk persistency on dairy cows which received different diet treatments during the declining phase of lactation (56 to 182 DIM). It calculates a covariate during a pre-treatment period from 21 to 35 DIM before the peak of lactation.
